description: Style NoteWith a sporty touch, this Graffiti Polo T-shirt from puma makes for a perfect casual wear. Crafted from soft cotton, this T-shirt is sure to offer exemplary comfort, while the distressed print on the front is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes.CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed spread collar with a three button chest placket, short sleeves with embroidered puma cat on the left sleeve, and distressed graphic print on the frontWash careWash and iron inside-outGentle machine wash in cool water with like colours, using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironFitRegularModel statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
